# This file works as a template for benchmarks being submitted to the runners hosted
# on UKSRC hardware.
#
#
#

name: Template for tests to remote runnter
run-name: ${{ github.actor }} is running.
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  workflow_call:
#  schedule:
#    - cron: "0 0 * * 1"
# "Minute Hour DayOfMonth(1-31) Month(1-12) DayOfWeek(0-6)"

jobs:
  # This searches the framework repo for all available runners and submits all workflows to them.
  discover-runners:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest  # Use GitHub-hosted for discovery
    outputs:
      matrix: ${{ steps.runner-retrieval.outputs.matrix }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - id: runner-retrieval
        uses: ./.github/actions/runner-retrieval
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}

  # All the remaining steps are examples of how steps can be run, each one must be set up for each benchmark.
  test-run: # Name of test to run
    needs: discover-runners
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include: ${{ fromJSON(needs.discover-runners.outputs.matrix) }}
    runs-on: [self-hosted, "${{ matrix.runner }}"]
    environment: production
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - uses: ./.github/actions/common-setup # This only installs the common software needed for the framework.

      # add installation steps needed for specific test
#      - name: Install stuff
#        shell: bash
#        run: |
#          echo "Install commands"

      # add steps to run the specific test
      - name: Run stuff
        id: runcall
        shell: bash
        run: |
          export RFM_CONFIG_FILES="${PWD}/benchmarks/reframe_config.py"
          export RFM_USE_LOGIN_SHELL="true"
          export SPACK_ROOT=$(which spack)
          export GH_RUNNER=${{ matrix.runner }}
          if [ -f "${SPACK_ROOT}/share/spack/setup-env.sh" ]; then
            source "${SPACK_ROOT}/share/spack/setup-env.sh"
          fi
          reframe -c ./benchmarks/apps/<TEST DIR> -n <TEST NAME> -r
